title: Job creation modal — job type and customer sections
tech: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, CSS Modules, Axios
keyConstraints: No inline styles — CSS Modules only. No UI component libraries. No token or user data in localStorage.
description: Build the JobCreateModal component with the first two sections: job type selection (button group) and customer lookup/create with phone-first search.
acceptanceCriteria: JobCreateModal component renders a modal overlay with job type and customer sections. JobsPage has a 'New job' button (Admin/Dispatcher only) that opens it.
Job type rendered as a horizontal button group: DELIVERY, PICKUP, DELIVERY_AND_PICKUP, INSTALLATION, SERVICE, COMBINED. Default: DELIVERY. Selected type stored in component state.
CustomerSection has a phone input that calls GET /api/customers?phone=<value> after 400ms debounce and shows a dropdown of up to 5 matches
Selecting a match pre-fills name, companyName, and PRIVATE/BUSINESS toggle. Customer id stored in state for later submission.
If no match found: user fills name and phone manually; PRIVATE/BUSINESS toggle shown. No match required — customer fields are optional.
All customer and jobType state lifted to JobCreateModal parent state
implementationNotes: Debounce with setTimeout/clearTimeout — no external library
Use axiosInstance from api/axios.ts for the customer lookup call
Dropdown closes on outside click (use useEffect + mousedown listener)
Job type button group: active state via CSS class, not inline style
